title: dalbergia adamii subsp. erectipilis
intro: Dalbergia adamii subsp. erectipilis, also known as the Erectipilis tree or Dalbergia, is a species of legume in the family Fabaceae. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The Erectipilis tree has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, highlighting its potential for treating a range of health concerns.
